queryList.1: hp_slave: select config_key, config_value from hp_sys_app_config where config_key = 'LARGE_AMOUNT_FULL_REDUCTION_OPEN_CONFIG' limit 1
queryList.2: hp_master: SELECT ta.id,ta.theme_sn,ta.subtitle_type,ta.subtitle_text,ta.theme_image_text,ta.auto_later_time,tc.index_image_url,tc.theme_color,tc.theme_image_url FROM hp_theme_activity ta LEFT JOIN hp_theme_color tc ON tc.id = ta.theme_color_id WHERE ta.is_deleted = 0 AND ta.city_name = '九江市' AND ta.active_status = 1 and ta.theme_type = 1 LIMIT 1
queryList.3: hp_master: SELECT id, rule_name, theme_sn, valid_type, start_time, end_time, rule_content_json, sort_score, active_status, is_deleted, create_id, create_time, update_id, update_time, rule_type, week_scope_limit, time_scope_type, time_scope_limit FROM hp_theme_activity_rule r where r.active_status=1 and r.is_deleted = 0 and r.theme_sn = '3691179J92' and rule_type in ( 1 , 2 , 4 ) and ( valid_type = 1 or (valid_type= 2 and start_time <= 1748510349645 and end_time > 1748510349645)) order by sort_score desc
queryList.4: hp_master: SELECT tsm.shop_id, tsm.shop_status, tsm.theme_rule_id, s.longitude, s.delivery_postcode_info, s.deliveryRange, sbc.business_category_id, s.latitude FROM hp_theme_shop_sub_middle tsm LEFT JOIN shop s on tsm.shop_id = s.shop_id LEFT JOIN hp_shop_business_category sbc on sbc.shop_id = tsm.shop_id and sbc.category_level = 2 and sbc.category_type = 0 and sbc.`status` = 1 left join hp_shop_site_config ssc on ssc.shop_id = tsm.shop_id where tsm.is_delete = 0 and s.is_del=0 and s.is_recommend=1 and s.is_supermarket = 0 and s.audit_status = 1 and tsm.is_delete = 0 and tsm.source_type = 1 and tsm.theme_rule_id = 647 and ssc.visible=1 and ssc.site = 'HP' group by tsm.shop_id
queryList.5: hp_master: SELECT id,theme_rule_id,product_id,is_advertisement,weight_value,is_shielded,is_deleted,create_id,create_time,update_id,update_time,dimension_type FROM hp_theme_rule_product_config WHERE (is_deleted = 0 AND theme_rule_id = 647 AND is_shielded = 1 AND dimension_type = 1)
queryList.6: hp_master: SELECT user_id,user_name,user_nick,user_password,user_pic,user_telphone,user_wx_openid,role_id,user_Invitation_code,create_time,update_time,is_del,reg_ip,user_status,user_salt,user_sex,audit_status,register_source,is_work,real_name,user_push_token,bs,tmp_uid,tmp_money,tmp_total_money,tmp_integral,tmp_order_counts,tmp_pmid,receiving_max,country,user_code,user_email,city_name,is_add_insure,country_code,is_add_zego,phone_number,run_type,base_salary,calling_code,is_tip_show,is_auto_receive_order,is_can_take_order,delivery_remark,qiyu_remark,is_special_driver,first_name,last_name,employee_type,hourly_salary,salary_rule_type,billing_cycle,send_count,shift_type,contract_status,id_photo_front,id_photo_back,star,driver_score,driver_score_frozen_expiry_date,reg_area_id,user_ali_open_id,user_wx_id,new_user_status,delivery_new_user_status,allow_promote,user_name_mask,user_telphone_mask,phone_number_mask,user_email_mask FROM user WHERE user_id=1398716816
queryList.7: hp_master: SELECT id,theme_rule_id,red_packet_id,red_packet_type_id,weight_value,is_deleted,create_time,update_time FROM hp_theme_rule_relate_red_packet WHERE (is_deleted = 0 AND theme_rule_id = 647) ORDER BY weight_value DESC limit 2000
queryList.8: hp_master: SELECT red_packet_id, red_packet_type_id as type, shop_id, is_tag_limit isTagList, red_packet_price, threshold_price, merchant_bear_price, platform_bear_percent, discount_limit, fusing_sub_price, user_collect_num_type, user_collect_num, discount_rate, activity_sn, fusing_discount_rate FROM red_packet rp where rp.is_del = 0 and rp.is_allow_big_full_sub = 1 and rp.effective_status = 1 and rp.`status`=0 AND (rp.count_number = 0 OR rp.count_number > rp.send_number) and (rp.city ='' or rp.city ='九江市') and rp.language_code in ("ALL","CN") and rp.crowd=1 and rp.red_packet_type_id in (1,4,9,12) and rp.red_packet_id in ( 10095984 , 888890468 , 888895374 , 888895375 , 888895376 , 888895377 , 888895378 , 888895379 , 888895380 , 888895381 , 888895382 , 888895383 ) order by red_packet_price desc Limit 3000
queryList.9: hp_master: SELECT hac.activity_sn , hac.sub_state, hac.break_type FROM hp_activity_config hac where hac.sts =1 and hac.`status` = 1 and hac.sub_state in (0,3,4,5) and hac.activity_sn in ( '1' )
queryList.10: hp_master: select u.red_packet_id,u.start_time,u.end_time,u.valid_days,u.create_time,u.is_used,u.status from user_cdkey u where u.is_del = 0 and u.user_id = 1398716816 and u.red_packet_id in ( 888895374 , 888895375 , 888895377 , 888895378 , 888895379 , 888895380 , 888895381 , 888895382 , 888895383 , 10095984 , 888890468 )
queryList.11: hp_master: SELECT user_id,user_name,user_nick,user_password,user_pic,user_telphone,user_wx_openid,role_id,user_Invitation_code,create_time,update_time,is_del,reg_ip,user_status,user_salt,user_sex,audit_status,register_source,is_work,real_name,user_push_token,bs,tmp_uid,tmp_money,tmp_total_money,tmp_integral,tmp_order_counts,tmp_pmid,receiving_max,country,user_code,user_email,city_name,is_add_insure,country_code,is_add_zego,phone_number,run_type,base_salary,calling_code,is_tip_show,is_auto_receive_order,is_can_take_order,delivery_remark,qiyu_remark,is_special_driver,first_name,last_name,employee_type,hourly_salary,salary_rule_type,billing_cycle,send_count,shift_type,contract_status,id_photo_front,id_photo_back,star,driver_score,driver_score_frozen_expiry_date,reg_area_id,user_ali_open_id,user_wx_id,new_user_status,delivery_new_user_status,allow_promote,user_name_mask,user_telphone_mask,phone_number_mask,user_email_mask FROM user WHERE user_id=1398716816
queryList.13: hp_master: select id, `name`, img_url, create_time, update_time, deleted from shop_activity_tag where id in ( 0 , 1 )
queryList.14: hp_slave: select config_key, config_value from hp_sys_app_config where config_key = 'MAKE_TIME_DEFAULT' limit 1
queryList.16: hp_master: SELECT a.shop_id, b.discount_sn, b.date_type, b.day_limit, b.time_limit, b.time_slot_type, b.crowd, c.sub_state, c.break_type, d.city FROM hp_delivery_discount_shop a LEFT JOIN hp_delivery_discount b ON a.discount_sn = b.discount_sn LEFT JOIN hp_activity_config c ON b.activity_sn = c.activity_sn LEFT JOIN shop d on a.shop_id=d.shop_id WHERE b.is_del = 0 AND a.is_del = 0 AND b.discount_status = 1 AND b.start_time <= 1748510349795 AND b.end_time > 1748510349795 AND a.shop_id IN ( 35263245 , 199713339 ) AND 1748510349795 between a.start_time and a.end_time
queryList.17: hp_master: select count(1) from member_entity where user_id = 1398716816 and is_del = 0 and status = 1 and member_start_time < 1748510349800 and member_end_time > 1748510349800
queryList.18: hp_master: select rec_id,user_id,device_id,label_group,label_id,create_time,update_time from hp_user_label WHERE user_id = 1398716816 and label_group = 'new' limit 1
queryList.19: hp_master: select distinct u.red_packet_id,u.collect_source from user_cdKey u where u.user_id=1398716816 and u.language_code in ('ALL' , 'CN') and u.is_used=0 and u.lock_status=0 and u.is_del=0 and u.start_time <= 1748510349807 and u.end_time >= 1748510349807 and u.status = 1 and (u.member_entity_id is null or u.member_entity_id = 0) and (u.city = '九江市' or u.city = '')
queryList.20: hp_slave: select config_key, config_value from hp_sys_app_config where config_key = 'FIRST_ORDER_DELIVERY_CONFIG' limit 1
queryList.21: hp_master: select shop_id,score,start_hour,end_hour,version from hp_index_shop_score where ( (end_hour >= 17 and start_hour <= 17) or (end_hour <= start_hour and (end_hour >= 17 or start_hour <= 17)) ) and shop_id in ( 387549545 , 335765650 , 422389118 , 35263245 , 669770737 , 617846488 , 199713339 , 160288176 , 345263066 , 855828829 ) and version = 2
queryList.22: hp_master: select index_area,average_score,start_hour,end_hour,version from hp_index_area_score where ( (end_hour >= 17 and start_hour <= 17) or (end_hour <= start_hour and (end_hour >= 17 or start_hour <= 17)) ) and index_area = '九江市' and version = 2
queryList.23: hp_master: SELECT rec_id,user_id,shop_id,user_shop_score,version FROM hp_index_user_shop_score WHERE (user_id = 1398716816 AND version = 2 AND shop_id IN (35263245,160288176,199713339,335765650,345263066,387549545,422389118,617846488,669770737,855828829))
queryList.24: hp_master: SELECT id,shop_id,shop_full_score,red_package_full_score,average_full_amount,update_time,version,update_task_id FROM hp_theme_red_package_score WHERE (shop_id IN (35263245,160288176,199713339,335765650,345263066,387549545,422389118,617846488,669770737,855828829) AND version = 1)
queryList.25: hp_master: /*FORCE_MASTER*/ select user_id,user_name,user_password,user_pic,user_telphone,user_wx_openid,user_Invitation_code,user_code,user_ali_open_id, create_time,update_time,is_del,reg_ip,user_nick,role_id,user_status,user_salt,user_push_token,bs,audit_status,real_name, delivery_new_user_status,user_push_token,user_email,user_name_mask,user_telphone_mask,user_email_mask ,receiving_max,country,is_add_insure,is_add_zego,is_tip_show,country,run_type,is_can_take_order,is_auto_receive_order,is_special_driver,calling_code ,salary_rule_type,contract_status,star,user_wx_openid,user_ali_open_id,new_user_status,delivery_new_user_status,register_source,user_email from user where user_id=1398716816 and role_id=0 and is_del=0
queryList.28: hp_slave: select config_key, config_value from hp_sys_app_config where config_key = 'OVER_AFFORD_ORDER_LIMIT_CITY_DOWN_RATE' limit 1
queryList.29: hp_master: select shop_id, lang, bg_image from shop_lang_extra where is_del = 0 AND is_supported = 1 and shop_id in ( 387549545 , 35263245 , 160288176 , 617846488 , 669770737 , 855828829 , 199713339 , 422389118 , 335765650 , 345263066 )
